title: Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanisms.

assets.abstract: Some people seem to have a 'talent' for spiritual experience: they readily sense the presence of supernatural beings, receive special messages from God, and report intense feelings of self-transcendence, awe and wonder. Here we review converging strands of evidence to argue that the trait of 'absorption' captures a general proclivity for having spiritual experiences. Participants scoring highly on the Tellegen Absorption Scale report vivid experiences of hearing God's voice during prayer, intens

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
